item.name: New laptop request
item.description: Request a new laptop. Standard issue laptops ship within 5 business days. Manager approval required for upgrade tiers.

variables.name: Laptop model
variables.options:
MacBook Air 13
MacBook Pro 14
MacBook Pro 16
Dell XPS 13
ThinkPad X1 Carbon
variables.helptext: Pick the model that fits your role. Engineering and design get the higher tiers.

variables.name: Need accessories?
variables.options:
Wireless mouse
External monitor
Mechanical keyboard
Docking station
Webcam
Noise-cancelling headset
variables.helptext: Standard issue includes a power adapter and laptop sleeve.

variables.name: Reason for request
variables.helptext: Briefly explain why this is needed (new hire, replacement, role change, etc.)

variables.name: Need by
variables.helptext: Optional. Standard delivery is 5 business days; rush requests need VP approval.
